_comment: Bench-mode orientation hints. `defaults` matches BOM type strings by keyword; `pedals` provides per-location overrides keyed by project slug. A BOMItem's explicit orientation_hint (set via double-click in the bench view) always wins.

defaults.signal diode: Band = cathode — match the stripe on the PCB silkscreen
defaults.schottky diode: Band = cathode — match the stripe on the PCB silkscreen
defaults.diode: Band = cathode — match the stripe on the PCB silkscreen
defaults.tantalum: + mark on cap → + marked pad on PCB
defaults.bjt transistor: Flat side matches the flat on the PCB silkscreen
defaults.jfet: Flat side matches the flat on the PCB silkscreen
defaults.mosfet: Flat side matches the flat on the PCB silkscreen
defaults.transistor: Flat side matches the flat on the PCB silkscreen

sherwood-overdrive._notes: PedalPCB Sherwood Overdrive 125B — fill in as you build. Defaults from the table above apply unless overridden here.
sherwood-overdrive.IC1: OPA2134PA: notch faces toward the pots (see PCB silkscreen)
sherwood-overdrive.D100: 1N5817 Schottky: band toward the DC jack + pad (reverse-polarity protection)
